purpose: Implementation of PluginWindow. Maintains a static registry of currently-open editor windows and constructs the appropriate AudioProcessorEditor (native via createEditorIfNeeded, GenericAudioProcessorEditor, or ProgramAudioProcessorEditor) on demand.
invariants: getActiveWindows() is a function-local static Array — accessed from the message thread only. The constructor adds `this` and the destructor removes it; every PluginWindow instance must follow that contract.
Editor creation is wrapped in try/catch — a plugin editor that throws must not bring down the host process.
gotchas: getWindowFor returns an existing Generic window for a Normal request when the plugin has no native editor — otherwise clicking Edit twice on such a plugin would spawn two duplicate Generic windows.
closeAllCurrentlyOpenWindows pumps a 50ms dispatch loop under a dummy modal Component (only when JUCE_MODAL_LOOPS_PERMITTED) to flush deferred deletes before returning.
closeButtonPressed calls `delete this` — the window must have been heap-allocated, which getWindowFor guarantees. Stack-allocating a PluginWindow would crash here.
ProgramAudioProcessorEditor uses PropertyComponent::refresh() as a no-op — it's a static list of program names, not a live editor.
